docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,250.00 FILED BY CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT LE, WAYNE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-16-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-16-2024 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-16-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-16-2024 BY VISITING JUDGE. PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY LUIS VILLALOBOS. DEFENDANT WAYNE LE IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LE, WAYNE $6,250.00 PRINCIPAL, $107.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,357.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
